title: ProtocolLab WebSocket Contract Verification
scope: Verify WebSocket public contract structure only; do not verify a WebSocket implementation, executor, package, or benchmark.
verification_method: Schema validation, scenario and suite reference resolution, deterministic payload inspection, fixture checks, and standards-link inspection.
procedure: Validate binding-specific establishment, echo, control-frame, and close scenarios.
Confirm HTTP/1.1 cleartext ws and TLS-protected wss use separate IDs and suites.
Confirm exact HTTP binding, security variant, and no-fallback checks.
Confirm the five RFC 9220 package-aligned IDs are preserved exactly without importing package support claims.
Validate ordered multi-message, exact fragment-plan, subprotocol, and permessage-deflate diagnostics and their capability-gated unsupported outcomes.
Confirm permessage-deflate disables both context-takeover directions and validates decompressed payload identity without requiring identical compressed bytes.
Confirm WebSocket profiles and breadth diagnostics are non-publishable.
expected_result: The WebSocket family has coherent shared semantics and exact binding identity without implying executable support.
